grammar.title: Is вҖ“ Am вҖ“ Are (Be-verb)
grammar.description: LГӨr dig anvГӨnda is, am och are pГҘ rГӨtt sГӨtt.

exercises.question: VГӨlj rГӨtt ord: 'I ___ happy.'
exercises.explanation: Vi anvГӨnder 'am' med I. I am happy.

exercises.question: VГӨlj rГӨtt ord: 'She ___ my friend.'
exercises.explanation: Vi anvГӨnder 'is' med she/he/it. She is my friend.

exercises.question: VГӨlj rГӨtt ord: 'They ___ at school.'
exercises.explanation: Vi anvГӨnder 'are' med they/we/you. They are at school.
Med I anvГӨnder vi alltid 'am'. I am a student.
The cat = it, sГҘ vi anvГӨnder 'is'. The cat is small.
Med we anvГӨnder vi 'are'. We are good friends.

exercises.question: VГӨlj rГӨtt ord: 'He ___ tall.'
exercises.explanation: Vi anvГӨnder 'is' med he. He is tall.

exercises.question: VГӨlj rГӨtt ord: 'You ___ very kind.'
exercises.explanation: Vi anvГӨnder 'are' med you. You are very kind.
Med it anvГӨnder vi 'is'. It is a sunny day.
My brothers = de (they), sГҘ vi anvГӨnder 'are'. My brothers are funny.
She is my sister. Vi anvГӨnder 'is' med she.

exercises.question: Vilken mening ГӨr rГӨtt?
exercises.explanation: Med I anvГӨnder vi alltid 'am'. I am tired.

exercises.question: Vilken mening ГӨr rГӨtt?
exercises.explanation: Med they anvГӨnder vi 'are'. They are happy.
NГӨr det ГӨr flera saker (plural) anvГӨnder vi 'are'. My dog and cat are outside.
We are at home. Med we anvГӨnder vi 'are'.

exercises.question: VГӨlj rГӨtt ord: 'The flowers ___ beautiful.'
exercises.explanation: The flowers = flera blommor (plural), sГҘ vi anvГӨnder 'are'. The flowers are beautiful.
Med I anvГӨnder vi 'am'. I am eight years old.

helpText: Be-verbet (att vara) ГӨndras beroende pГҘ vem du talar om вҖ“ precis som 'ГӨr' pГҘ svenska gГ¶r vi det pГҘ engelska med tre olika former.
Regel: I вҶ’ am | He / She / It вҶ’ is | You / We / They вҶ’ are
Exempel: I am happy. вң”  She is my friend. вң”  We are at school. вң”
Tips: Om du kan byta ut orden mot 'he/she/it' вҶ’ skriv IS. Kan du byta mot 'we/they'? вҶ’ skriv ARE.

grammar.title: Have вҖ“ Has (Att ha)
grammar.description: LГӨr dig nГӨr du ska anvГӨnda have och has.

exercises.question: VГӨlj rГӨtt ord: 'I ___ a red bike.'
exercises.explanation: Med I/you/we/they anvГӨnder vi 'have'. I have a red bike.

exercises.question: VГӨlj rГӨtt ord: 'She ___ long hair.'
exercises.explanation: Med she/he/it anvГӨnder vi 'has'. She has long hair.
My dog = it. Med he/she/it anvГӨnder vi 'has'. My dog has a brown tail.
Med we anvГӨnder vi 'have'. We have a big house.

exercises.question: VГӨlj rГӨtt ord: 'He ___ two brothers.'
exercises.explanation: Med he/she/it anvГӨnder vi 'has'. He has two brothers.

exercises.question: VГӨlj rГӨtt ord: 'They ___ a pet fish.'
exercises.explanation: Med they anvГӨnder vi 'have'. They have a pet fish.
The bird = it. Vi anvГӨnder 'has'. The bird has colorful feathers.
Med you anvГӨnder vi 'have'. You have a great smile.

exercises.instruction: Bygg meningen: 'He has a new book.'
exercises.explanation: He has a new book. Med he anvГӨnder vi 'has'.

exercises.question: Vilken mening ГӨr rГӨtt?
exercises.explanation: Med she anvГӨnder vi 'has'. She has a cat.

exercises.question: Vilken mening ГӨr rГӨtt?
exercises.explanation: Med they anvГӨnder vi 'have'. They have toys.
My teacher = han/hon. Vi anvГӨnder 'has'. My teacher has a black pen.
Med I anvГӨnder vi 'have'. I have blue eyes.

exercises.question: VГӨlj rГӨtt ord: 'The tree ___ green leaves.'
exercises.explanation: The tree = it. Med it anvГӨnder vi 'has'. The tree has green leaves.

exercises.instruction: Bygg meningen: 'We have a new car.'
exercises.explanation: We have a new car. Med we anvГӨnder vi 'have'.
My friends = de (they). Vi anvГӨnder 'have'. My friends have nice backpacks.

helpText: Have/has betyder 'ha'. Ha/has fГ¶ljer samma mГ¶nster som am/is/are.
Regel: I / You / We / They вҶ’ have | He / She / It вҶ’ has
Exempel: I have a dog. вң”  She has a cat. вң”  They have two books. вң”
Tips: Om du skulle anvГӨnda IS вҶ’ anvГӨnd HAS. Om du skulle anvГӨnda ARE вҶ’ anvГӨnd HAVE.

grammar.title: A / An (ObestГӨmd artikel)
grammar.description: LГӨr dig skillnaden mellan a och an.

exercises.question: VГӨlj rГӨtt: '___ apple'
exercises.explanation: Apple bГ¶rjar med vokalljudet A, sГҘ vi anvГӨnder 'an'. An apple.

exercises.question: VГӨlj rГӨtt: '___ dog'
exercises.explanation: Dog bГ¶rjar med konsonanten D, sГҘ vi anvГӨnder 'a'. A dog.
Orange bГ¶rjar med vokalljudet O, sГҘ vi anvГӨnder 'an'. I have an orange.
Red bГ¶rjar med konsonanten R, sГҘ vi anvГӨnder 'a'. She has a red hat.

exercises.question: VГӨlj rГӨtt: '___ elephant'
exercises.explanation: Elephant bГ¶rjar med vokalljudet E, sГҘ vi anvГӨnder 'an'. An elephant.

exercises.question: VГӨlj rГӨtt: '___ book'
exercises.explanation: Book bГ¶rjar med konsonanten B, sГҘ vi anvГӨnder 'a'. A book.

exercises.sentence: There is ___ umbrella by the door.
exercises.explanation: Umbrella bГ¶rjar med vokalljudet U, sГҘ vi anvГӨnder 'an'. There is an umbrella by the door.

exercises.sentence: I see ___ cat in the garden.
exercises.explanation: Cat bГ¶rjar med konsonanten C, sГҘ vi anvГӨnder 'a'. I see a cat in the garden.

exercises.question: VГӨlj rГӨtt: '___ ice cream'
exercises.explanation: Ice cream bГ¶rjar med vokalljudet I, sГҘ vi anvГӨnder 'an'. An ice cream.

exercises.question: VГӨlj rГӨtt: '___ big house'
exercises.explanation: Big bГ¶rjar med konsonanten B, sГҘ vi anvГӨnder 'a'. A big house.
Egg bГ¶rjar med vokalljudet E, sГҘ vi anvГӨnder 'an'. He is eating an egg.
New bГ¶rjar med konsonantljudet N, sГҘ vi anvГӨnder 'a'. We have a new teacher.

exercises.question: Vilken mening ГӨr rГӨtt?
options: I saw the big dog one.
exercises.explanation: Big bГ¶rjar med konsonanten B, sГҘ vi anvГӨnder 'a'. I saw a big dog.

exercises.question: Vilken mening ГӨr rГӨtt?
exercises.explanation: Orange bГ¶rjar med vokalljudet O, sГҘ vi anvГӨnder 'an'. She has an orange.

exercises.instruction: Bygg meningen: 'I have an old book.'
exercises.explanation: Old bГ¶rjar med vokalljudet O, sГҘ vi anvГӨnder 'an'. I have an old book.

exercises.sentence: There is ___ ant on the leaf.
exercises.explanation: Ant bГ¶rjar med vokalljudet A, sГҘ vi anvГӨnder 'an'. There is an ant on the leaf.

exercises.question: VГӨlj rГӨtt: '___ yellow bird'
exercises.explanation: Yellow bГ¶rjar med konsonantljudet Y, sГҘ vi anvГӨnder 'a'. A yellow bird.

helpText: A eller an? Det beror pГҘ hur nГӨsta ord LГ…TER, inte hur det stavas!
A anvГӨnds fГ¶re konsonantljud: a dog, a cat, a big house, a university (u lГҘter 'ju').
An anvГӨnds fГ¶re vokalljud (a, e, i, o, u): an apple, an orange, an elephant, an umbrella.
Tips: LГӨs ordet hГ¶gt вҖ“ bГ¶rjar det med ett vokalljud? DГҘ an! Annars a.

grammar.title: Plural Forms (Plural)
grammar.description: LГӨr dig hur man bildar plural (flertal) pГҘ engelska.

exercises.question: Vad ГӨr plural av 'cat'?
exercises.explanation: De flesta ord bildar plural med -s. Cat вҶ’ cats.

exercises.question: Vad ГӨr plural av 'box'?
exercises.explanation: Ord som slutar pГҘ -x bildar plural med -es. Box вҶ’ boxes.
Dog bildar plural med -s. I have two dogs.

exercises.sentence: There are five ___ in the tree. (bird)
exercises.explanation: Bird bildar plural med -s. There are five birds in the tree.

exercises.question: Vad ГӨr plural av 'child'?
exercises.explanation: Child ГӨr ett oregelbundet ord. Plural ГӨr 'children', inte 'childs'.

exercises.question: Vad ГӨr plural av 'tooth'?
exercises.explanation: Tooth ГӨr ett oregelbundet ord. Plural ГӨr 'teeth'.
Book bildar plural med -s. She has three books.
Child har oregelbundet plural: children. The children are playing outside.

exercises.question: Vad ГӨr plural av 'bus'?
exercises.explanation: Ord som slutar pГҘ -s bildar plural med -es. Bus вҶ’ buses.

exercises.question: Vad ГӨr plural av 'man'?
exercises.explanation: Man ГӨr ett oregelbundet ord. Plural ГӨr 'men'.
Fox slutar pГҘ -x, sГҘ plural blir foxes. I see two foxes.
Cow bildar plural med -s. The cows are eating grass.

exercises.question: Vad ГӨr plural av 'fish'?
exercises.explanation: Fish kan vara bГҘde singular och plural. One fish, two fish.

exercises.question: Vilken mening ГӨr rГӨtt?
exercises.explanation: Foot har oregelbundet plural: feet. I have two feet.

exercises.instruction: Bygg meningen: 'The dogs are running fast.'
exercises.explanation: Dogs ГӨr plural av dog. The dogs are running fast.
Pencil bildar plural med -s. We have four pencils.

helpText: Plural = flertal (mer ГӨn en sak). PГҘ engelska lГӨgger vi oftast till -s i slutet.
Regel: de flesta ord + s. Ord som slutar pГҘ -s, -x, -z, -ch, -sh вҶ’ lГӨgg till -es: busвҶ’buses, boxвҶ’boxes.
Oregelbundna former du mГҘste memorera: childвҶ’children, manвҶ’men, womanвҶ’women, mouseвҶ’mice, toothвҶ’teeth.
Tips: TГӨnk dig att du rГӨknar: one cat вҶ’ two cats. One child вҶ’ two children.

grammar.title: This вҖ“ That вҖ“ These вҖ“ Those (Pekord)
grammar.description: LГӨr dig anvГӨnda this, that, these och those.

exercises.question: Vilket ord anvГӨnder vi fГ¶r nГҘgot nГӨra oss вҖ“ ETT fГ¶remГҘl?
exercises.explanation: 'This' anvГӨnds fГ¶r ett fГ¶remГҘl som ГӨr nГӨra dig. This book (den hГӨr boken).

exercises.question: Vilket ord anvГӨnder vi fГ¶r nГҘgot lГҘngt borta вҖ“ ETT fГ¶remГҘl?
exercises.explanation: 'That' anvГӨnds fГ¶r ett fГ¶remГҘl som ГӨr lГҘngt borta. That house (det dГӨr huset).
'This' = nГӨra + ett fГ¶remГҘl. This is my pencil.
'These' = nГӨra + flera fГ¶remГҘl. These are my shoes.

exercises.question: VГӨlj rГӨtt: 'Peka pГҘ flera saker lГҘngt borta: ___ are big trees.'
exercises.explanation: 'Those' anvГӨnds fГ¶r flera fГ¶remГҘl som ГӨr lГҘngt borta. Those are big trees.

exercises.question: VГӨlj rГӨtt: '___ dog is cute.' (hunden ГӨr precis bredvid dig)
exercises.explanation: 'This' = nГӨra + ett. This dog is cute.

exercises.sentence: ___ clouds look dark. (moln lГҘngt borta, flera)
exercises.explanation: 'Those' = lГҘngt borta + flera. Those clouds look dark.

exercises.sentence: ___ is a beautiful flower. (nГӨra dig, en blomma)
exercises.explanation: 'This' = nГӨra + ett. This is a beautiful flower.

exercises.question: VГӨlj rГӨtt: '___ birds are singing.' (fГҘglarna ГӨr nГӨra dig, flera)
exercises.explanation: 'These' = nГӨra + flera. These birds are singing.

exercises.question: VГӨlj rГӨtt: '___ mountain is very tall.' (berget ГӨr lГҘngt borta, ett)
exercises.explanation: 'That' = lГҘngt borta + ett. That mountain is very tall.

exercises.instruction: Bygg meningen: 'That is a big elephant.'
exercises.explanation: That is a big elephant. 'That' anvГӨnds fГ¶r ett fГ¶remГҘl lГҘngt borta.
'These' = nГӨra + flera. These are my best friends.

exercises.question: Vilken mening ГӨr rГӨtt? (Ett ГӨpple precis framfГ¶r dig)
exercises.explanation: NГӨra + ett = this. This apple is red.
'That' = lГҘngt borta + ett. That house over there is yellow.

exercises.question: VГӨlj rГӨtt: '___ are my books.' (bГ¶ckerna ГӨr precis hos dig, flera)
exercises.explanation: 'These' = nГӨra + flera. These are my books.

helpText: Pekord hjГӨlper oss peka ut saker: ГӨr de NГ„RA dig eller LГ…NGT BORT?
NГӨra + en sak: this (denna). NГӨra + flera saker: these (dessa).
LГҘngt bort + en sak: that (den dГӨr). LГҘngt bort + flera saker: those (de dГӨr).
Tips: TГӨnk 'th-IS' = IS nГӨra (singular) och 'th-OSE' = OSA-ffar bort (plural).

grammar.title: Possessive Adjectives (Г„gande ord: my, your, his, her)
grammar.description: LГӨr dig ГӨgande ord som my, your, his, her, its, our, their.

exercises.question: VГӨlj rГӨtt: 'I have a cat. ___ cat is black.'
exercises.explanation: I вҶ’ My. Mitt kattdjur. My cat is black.

exercises.question: VГӨlj rГӨtt: 'She has a bag. ___ bag is pink.'
exercises.explanation: She вҶ’ Her. Hennes vГӨska. Her bag is pink.

exercises.sentence: He has a bike. ___ bike is blue.
exercises.explanation: He вҶ’ His. Hans cykel. His bike is blue.

exercises.sentence: We have a house. ___ house is big.
exercises.explanation: We вҶ’ Our. VГҘrt hus. Our house is big.

exercises.question: VГӨlj rГӨtt: 'You have a phone. ___ phone is new.'
exercises.explanation: You вҶ’ Your. Din telefon. Your phone is new.

exercises.question: VГӨlj rГӨtt: 'They have a garden. ___ garden is lovely.'
exercises.explanation: They вҶ’ Their. Deras trГӨdgГҘrd. Their garden is lovely.

exercises.sentence: The dog has a bone. ___ bone is big.
exercises.explanation: The dog = it вҶ’ its. Hundens ben. Its bone is big.
I вҶ’ my. Jag ГӨlskar min familj. I love my family.

exercises.question: VГӨlj rГӨtt: 'She likes ___ teacher.'
exercises.explanation: She вҶ’ her. Hon gillar sin lГӨrare. She likes her teacher.

exercises.question: VГӨlj rГӨtt: 'He forgot ___ lunch box.'
exercises.explanation: He вҶ’ his. Han glГ¶mde sin matlГҘda. He forgot his lunch box.
We вҶ’ our. Vi leker med vГҘra vГӨnner. We play with our friends.
They вҶ’ their. De ГӨter sin lunch i skolan. They eat their lunch at school.

exercises.instruction: Bygg meningen: 'My dog is very fast.'
exercises.explanation: My dog is very fast. My = mitt/min (I вҶ’ My).

exercises.question: Vilken mening ГӨr rГӨtt?
exercises.explanation: She вҶ’ her. Hon har tappat sina nycklar. She has lost her keys.

exercises.question: VГӨlj rГӨtt: 'Can you help me find ___ hat?'
exercises.explanation: Jag (I) frГҘgar om min hatt вҶ’ my. Can you help me find my hat?

exercises.sentence: You should brush ___ teeth every day.
exercises.explanation: You вҶ’ your. Du ska borsta dina tГӨnder varje dag. You should brush your teeth every day.

helpText: Г„gande adjektiv berГӨttar VEM som ГӨger nГҘgot och stГҘr alltid FГ–RE substantivet.
Regel: IвҶ’my, YouвҶ’your, HeвҶ’his, SheвҶ’her, ItвҶ’its, WeвҶ’our, TheyвҶ’their.
Exempel: This is my book. вң”  He loves his dog. вң”  We like our teacher. вң”
Tips: Byt ut personen mot det ГӨgande adjektivet вҖ“ aldrig 'I book', alltid 'my book'!

grammar.title: Possessive Pronouns (Г„gande pronomen: mine, yours)
grammar.description: LГӨr dig ГӨgande pronomen som mine, yours, his, hers, ours, theirs.

exercises.question: 'This is my book.' SГӨg samma sak med pronomen: 'This book is ___.'
exercises.explanation: Mine ersГӨtter 'my + noun'. This book is mine. (Den hГӨr boken ГӨr min.)

exercises.question: 'That is your pencil.' SГӨg samma sak: 'That pencil is ___.'
exercises.explanation: Yours ersГӨtter 'your + noun'. That pencil is yours. (Den dГӨr pennan ГӨr din.)
Mine = mitt/min. The red ball is mine.
Yours = din/ditt. Is that coat yours?

exercises.question: 'This is his bag.' SГӨg samma sak: 'This bag is ___.'
exercises.explanation: His anvГӨnds som bГҘde possessive adjective och possessive pronoun. This bag is his.

exercises.question: 'That is her hat.' SГӨg samma sak: 'That hat is ___.'
exercises.explanation: Hers ersГӨtter 'her + noun'. That hat is hers. (Den dГӨr hatten ГӨr hennes.)
Ours = vГҘr/vГҘrt. The blue car is ours.
Theirs = deras. That house is theirs.

exercises.question: VГӨlj rГӨtt: 'This is not my pen. It is ___.' (den ГӨr din)
exercises.explanation: Yours ersГӨtter 'your pen'. It is yours.

exercises.question: VГӨlj rГӨtt: 'These are not your shoes. They are ___.' (de ГӨr mina)
exercises.explanation: Mine ersГӨtter 'my shoes'. They are mine.

exercises.sentence: That dog is not ours. It is ___. (deras)
exercises.explanation: Theirs = deras. It is theirs.
His fungerar bГҘde som adjektiv och pronomen. Is this book his?

exercises.instruction: Bygg meningen: 'That red bag is hers.'
exercises.explanation: Hers ersГӨtter 'her bag'. That red bag is hers.

exercises.question: Vilken mening ГӨr rГӨtt?
exercises.explanation: Mine anvГӨnds ensamt (utan substantiv). This sandwich is mine.

exercises.question: VГӨlj rГӨtt: 'The green bike is ___.' (cykel tillhГ¶r vi/oss)
exercises.explanation: Ours ersГӨtter 'our bike'. The green bike is ours.

helpText: Г„gande pronomen ERSГ„TTER hela substantivfrasen вҖ“ de stГҘr ensamma utan substantiv.
Regel: myвҶ’mine, yourвҶ’yours, hisвҶ’his, herвҶ’hers, ourвҶ’ours, theirвҶ’theirs.
Exempel: 'This is my book' вҶ’ 'This book is mine.' (mine ersГӨtter 'my book')
Tips: Adjektiv + substantiv вҶ’ pronomen. 'Her cat' вҶ’ 'The cat is hers.'

grammar.title: There is / There are (Det finns)
grammar.description: LГӨr dig anvГӨnda 'there is' och 'there are' fГ¶r att sГӨga vad som finns.

exercises.question: VГӨlj rГӨtt: '___ a cat on the sofa.'
exercises.explanation: En katt (singular) вҶ’ There is. There is a cat on the sofa.

exercises.question: VГӨlj rГӨtt: '___ three birds in the tree.'
exercises.explanation: Tre fГҘglar (plural) вҶ’ There are. There are three birds in the tree.

exercises.sentence: There ___ a big park near my house.
exercises.explanation: En park (singular) вҶ’ there is. There is a big park near my house.

exercises.sentence: There ___ many children in the playground.
exercises.explanation: Many children (plural) вҶ’ there are. There are many children in the playground.

exercises.question: VГӨlj rГӨtt: '___ an apple on the table.'
exercises.explanation: Ett ГӨpple (singular) вҶ’ There is. There is an apple on the table.

exercises.question: VГӨlj rГӨtt: '___ two dogs in the garden.'
exercises.explanation: TvГҘ hundar (plural) вҶ’ There are. There are two dogs in the garden.

exercises.sentence: There ___ a nice teacher in our school.
exercises.explanation: En lГӨrare (singular) вҶ’ there is. There is a nice teacher in our school.

exercises.sentence: There ___ five books on the shelf.
exercises.explanation: Five books (plural) вҶ’ there are. There are five books on the shelf.

exercises.question: Vilken mening ГӨr rГӨtt?
exercises.explanation: En hund (singular) вҶ’ There is a dog.

exercises.question: Vilken mening ГӨr rГӨtt?
exercises.explanation: Fyra katter (plural) вҶ’ There are four cats.

exercises.instruction: Bygg meningen: 'There is a sun in the sky.'
exercises.explanation: En sol (singular) вҶ’ There is. There is a sun in the sky.

exercises.sentence: There ___ no milk in the glass.
exercises.explanation: Milk (singular) вҶ’ there is. There is no milk in the glass.

exercises.sentence: There ___ a lot of flowers in the garden.
exercises.explanation: Many flowers (plural) вҶ’ there are. There are a lot of flowers in the garden.

exercises.question: VГӨlj rГӨtt: '___ a rainbow after the rain.'
exercises.explanation: En regnbГҘge (singular) вҶ’ There is. There is a rainbow after the rain.

exercises.instruction: Bygg meningen: 'There are six chairs at the table.'
exercises.explanation: Sex stolar (plural) вҶ’ There are. There are six chairs at the table.

helpText: 'There is' och 'there are' anvГӨnds fГ¶r att sГӨga att nГҘgot FINNS pГҘ ett stГӨlle.
Regel: There IS + en sak (singular). There ARE + flera saker (plural).
Exempel: There is a cat on the chair. вң”  There are three apples in the bowl. вң”
Tips: Titta pГҘ substantivet efter вҖ“ ГӨr det ensamt? вҶ’ IS. Г„r det flera? вҶ’ ARE.

grammar.title: Can / Can't (Kunna)
grammar.description: LГӨr dig anvГӨnda can och can't fГ¶r att prata om fГ¶rmГҘgor.

exercises.question: Hur sГӨger man 'Jag kan simma' pГҘ engelska?
exercises.explanation: Can + verb (grundform). I can swim. Can ГӨndras aldrig вҖ“ inte 'cans'.

exercises.question: Hur sГӨger man 'Hon kan inte flyga' pГҘ engelska?
exercises.explanation: Can't = cannot (kort form). She can't fly.
Can + verb grundform. I can ride a bike.
Can ГӨndras inte efter he/she/it. He can speak three languages.

exercises.question: VГӨlj rГӨtt: 'Birds ___ fly.'
exercises.explanation: FГҘglar kan flyga. Birds can fly.

exercises.question: VГӨlj rГӨtt: 'Fish ___ climb trees.'
exercises.explanation: Fiskar kan inte klГӨttra i trГӨd. Fish can't climb trees.

exercises.sentence: She ___ play the piano very well.
exercises.explanation: Can + verb grundform. She can play the piano very well.

exercises.hint: Jag kan INTE hitta mina skor.
exercises.explanation: Can't = cannot. I can't find my shoes!

exercises.question: VГӨlj rГӨtt: 'My baby brother ___ walk yet.'
exercises.explanation: Han kan inte gГҘ ГӨn. My baby brother can't walk yet.

exercises.question: VГӨlj rГӨtt: '___ you help me please?'
exercises.explanation: FrГҘga med can: Can you help me please?
Can + verb grundform. Dogs can bark.
Can't = cannot. Cats can't bark.

exercises.instruction: Bygg meningen: 'She can run very fast.'
exercises.explanation: Can + verb grundform (run, inte runs). She can run very fast.

exercises.question: Vilken mening ГӨr rГӨtt?
exercises.explanation: Can ГӨndras aldrig + verb grundform. He can swim.

exercises.question: Vilken frГҘga ГӨr rГӨtt?
exercises.explanation: FrГҘgor med can: Can + subject + verb? Can you dance?
FrГҘgor med can: Can you speak English?

helpText: 'Can' anvГӨnds fГ¶r att berГӨtta vad du KLARAR AV att gГ¶ra (fГ¶rmГҘga).
Viktigt: efter 'can' och 'can't' kommer ALLTID grundformen av verbet вҖ“ aldrig -s!
Can't = cannot (kan inte). Exempel: I can swim. вң”  She can't fly. вң”  He can draw. вң”
Tips: Can fГ¶rГӨndras aldrig! Aldrig 'She cans' вҖ“ alltid 'She can'.

grammar.title: Prepositions of Place (LГӨgesord: in, on, under)
grammar.description: LГӨr dig lГӨgesord som in, on, under, next to och behind.

exercises.question: Katten sitter inuti lГҘdan. VГӨlj rГӨtt: 'The cat is ___ the box.'
exercises.explanation: 'In' = inuti. The cat is in the box.

exercises.question: Boken ligger ovanpГҘ bordet. VГӨlj rГӨtt: 'The book is ___ the table.'
exercises.explanation: 'On' = ovanpГҘ. The book is on the table.

exercises.sentence: The dog is ___ the chair. (under stolen)
exercises.explanation: 'Under' = under/nedanfГ¶r. The dog is under the chair.
'In' = inuti. My keys are in my bag.

exercises.question: Lampan sitter precis ovanpГҘ bordet. VГӨlj rГӨtt: 'The lamp is ___ the desk.'
exercises.explanation: 'On' = ovanpГҘ. The lamp is on the desk.

exercises.question: Bilen parkerar bakom huset. VГӨlj rГӨtt: 'The car is ___ the house.'
exercises.explanation: 'Behind' = bakom. The car is behind the house.

exercises.sentence: The school is ___ to the park. (bredvid)
exercises.explanation: 'Next to' = bredvid. The school is next to the park.

exercises.sentence: The bird is sitting ___ the fence. (ovanpГҘ)
exercises.explanation: 'On' = ovanpГҘ. The bird is sitting on the fence.

exercises.question: VГӨlj rГӨtt: 'There are fish ___ the water.'
exercises.explanation: Fiskar ГӨr inuti vattnet вҶ’ 'in'. There are fish in the water.

exercises.question: VГӨlj rГӨtt: 'The shoes are ___ the bed.'
exercises.explanation: Skorna ГӨr under sГӨngen вҶ’ 'under'. The shoes are under the bed.

exercises.instruction: Bygg meningen: 'The ball is under the table.'
exercises.explanation: 'Under' = under. The ball is under the table.

exercises.sentence: My pencil case is ___ my bag. (inuti)
exercises.explanation: 'In' = inuti. My pencil case is in my bag.

exercises.question: VГӨlj rГӨtt: 'Please put the cup ___ the shelf.'
exercises.explanation: SГӨtt koppen ovanpГҘ hyllan вҶ’ 'on'. Please put the cup on the shelf.

exercises.sentence: The teacher is standing ___ the board. (bredvid)
exercises.explanation: 'Next to' = bredvid. The teacher is standing next to the board.

exercises.question: VГӨlj rГӨtt: 'I found my toy ___ the sofa.' (bakom sofan)
exercises.explanation: Bakom sofan вҶ’ 'behind'. I found my toy behind the sofa.

exercises.instruction: Bygg meningen: 'My cat sleeps on my bed.'
exercises.explanation: 'On' = ovanpГҘ. My cat sleeps on my bed.

helpText: LГӨgesord berГӨttar VAR nГҘgot befinner sig.
In = inuti (in the box), on = pГҘ en yta (on the table), under = under, next to = bredvid, behind = bakom.
Exempel: The cat is in the box. вң”  The book is on the desk. вң”  The bag is under the chair. вң”
Tips: FГ¶restГӨll dig en lГҘda вҖ“ ГӨr katten inuti, ovanpГҘ eller bakom den?

grammar.title: Short Answers (Korta svar)
grammar.description: LГӨr dig svara kort pГҘ yes/no-frГҘgor pГҘ engelska.

exercises.question: 'Are you happy?' вҖ“ Svara ja med kort svar.
exercises.explanation: Are you...? вҶ’ Yes, I am. / No, I'm not. Vi upprepar hjГӨlpverbet 'are' вҶ’ am (fГ¶r I).

exercises.question: 'Is she at home?' вҖ“ Svara nej med kort svar.
exercises.explanation: Is she...? вҶ’ No, she isn't. (isn't = is not)
Are they...? вҶ’ Yes, they are. Vi upprepar hjГӨlpverbet 'are'.
Is it...? вҶ’ No, it isn't. (isn't = is not)

exercises.question: 'Can you swim?' вҖ“ Svara ja med kort svar.
exercises.explanation: Can you...? вҶ’ Yes, I can. Vi upprepar hjГӨlpverbet 'can'.

exercises.question: 'Can he play guitar?' вҖ“ Svara nej med kort svar.
exercises.explanation: Can he...? вҶ’ No, he can't. (can't = cannot)

exercises.sentence: 'Can they come to the party?' вҖ“ 'Yes, they ___.'
exercises.explanation: Can they...? вҶ’ Yes, they can.
Is your dog...? вҶ’ Yes, it is. (Vi sГӨger 'it' om djur.)

exercises.question: 'Are you hungry?' вҖ“ Svara nej med kort svar.
exercises.explanation: Are you...? вҶ’ No, I'm not. (I'm not = I am not)

exercises.question: 'Have you got a brother?' вҖ“ Svara ja med kort svar.
exercises.explanation: Have you got...? вҶ’ Yes, I have. Vi upprepar hjГӨlpverbet 'have'.

exercises.sentence: 'Has she got a pet?' вҖ“ 'No, she ___.'
exercises.explanation: Has she got...? вҶ’ No, she hasn't. (hasn't = has not)
Are we...? вҶ’ No, we aren't. (aren't = are not)

exercises.instruction: Bygg svaret: 'Yes, I am.' (svar pГҘ 'Are you a student?')
exercises.explanation: Are you...? вҶ’ Yes, I am. Kort svar upprepar hjГӨlpverbet.

exercises.question: 'Is the cat sleeping?' вҖ“ Svara ja med kort svar.
exercises.explanation: Is the cat...? вҶ’ Yes, it is. Vi upprepar 'is' och anvГӨnder 'it' fГ¶r djur.

exercises.question: 'Can you read this word?' вҖ“ Svara nej med kort svar.
exercises.explanation: Can you...? вҶ’ No, I can't. Vi upprepar 'can' i negativ form.

exercises.sentence: 'Have you got a pencil?' вҖ“ 'Yes, I ___.'
exercises.explanation: Have you got...? вҶ’ Yes, I have.

helpText: Korta svar pГҘ ja/nej-frГҘgor: repetera hjГӨlpverbet frГҘn frГҘgan вҖ“ lГӨgg INTE till andra ord!
MГ¶nster: Are you...? вҶ’ Yes, I am. / No, I'm not.  Is she...? вҶ’ Yes, she is. / No, she isn't.
Can he...? вҶ’ Yes, he can. / No, he can't.  Do they...? вҶ’ Yes, they do. / No, they don't.
Tips: Lyssna pГҘ FГ–RSTA verbet i frГҘgan (is/are/can/do) вҖ“ det ГӨr det du upprepar i svaret!

grammar.title: Substantiv (Nouns)
grammar.description: LГӨr dig vad ett substantiv ГӨr och hur man skriver dem.

exercises.question: Vilket av dessa ord ГӨr ett substantiv (namn pГҘ en sak, person eller plats)?
exercises.explanation: 'Cat' ГӨr ett substantiv вҖ“ det ГӨr ett djur (en sak). 'Run' ГӨr ett verb, 'happy' ГӨr ett adjektiv och 'quickly' ГӨr ett adverb.

exercises.question: Vilket ord ГӨr ett substantiv?
exercises.explanation: 'School' ГӨr ett substantiv вҖ“ det ГӨr en plats.

exercises.question: Vilket ГӨr INTE ett substantiv?
exercises.explanation: 'Tall' ГӨr ett adjektiv som beskriver hur nГҘgot ser ut, inte ett namn pГҘ en sak.

exercises.question: VГӨlj substantivet i meningen: 'The dog runs fast.'
exercises.explanation: 'Dog' ГӨr ett substantiv вҖ“ det ГӨr ett djur.

exercises.sentence: A ___ is a place where you learn. (school/run)
exercises.explanation: School (skola) ГӨr ett substantiv вҖ“ en plats vi kan namnge.

exercises.sentence: A ___ is an animal with four legs. (cat/jump)
exercises.explanation: Cat (katt) ГӨr ett substantiv вҖ“ ett djurnamn.

exercises.question: Hur mГҘnga substantiv finns i meningen 'The girl has a dog'?
exercises.explanation: Girl och dog ГӨr bГҘda substantiv. The och has ГӨr inte substantiv.

exercises.question: Vilket ord ГӨr ett substantiv?
exercises.explanation: 'Teacher' (lГӨrare) ГӨr ett substantiv вҖ“ en person.

exercises.sentence: A ___ is a building where people live. (house/big)
exercises.explanation: House (hus) ГӨr ett substantiv вҖ“ en plats.

exercises.question: VГӨlj det substantiv som ГӨr en plats:
exercises.explanation: 'Park' ГӨr ett substantiv som beskriver en plats.

grammar.title: Adjektiv & Adverb
grammar.description: Ord som beskriver saker och hur man gГ¶r saker.

exercises.question: Vilket ord ГӨr ett adjektiv (beskriver hur nГҘgot ser ut/ГӨr)?
exercises.explanation: 'Big' (stor) ГӨr ett adjektiv вҖ“ det beskriver en sak.

exercises.question: VГӨlj adjektivet: 'The ___ cat sat on the mat.'
exercises.explanation: 'Fluffy' (lurvig) beskriver katten вҖ“ det ГӨr ett adjektiv.

exercises.question: Vilket ord ГӨr ett adverb (beskriver hur man gГ¶r nГҘgot)?
exercises.explanation: 'Fast' (snabbt) ГӨr ett adverb вҖ“ det beskriver HUR man gГ¶r nГҘgot.
'Fast' (snabbt) ГӨr ett adverb som beskriver HUR hunden springer.

exercises.question: 'She has a ___ dress.' Vilket ord passar bГӨst?
exercises.explanation: 'Beautiful' (vacker) ГӨr ett adjektiv som beskriver klГӨnningen.
'Bright' (ljus/stark) ГӨr ett adjektiv som beskriver solen.

exercises.question: Vilket ГӨr ett adjektiv?
exercises.explanation: 'Happy' (glad) ГӨr adjektivet вҖ“ adverbet ГӨr 'happily'.

exercises.question: 'He sings ___.' Vilket passar?
exercises.explanation: 'Loudly' (hГ¶gt) ГӨr ett adverb вҖ“ det beskriver HUR han sjunger.
'Kind' (snГӨll) ГӨr adjektivet. 'Kindly' ГӨr adverb.

exercises.question: 'The ___ bird flew away.' VГӨlj adjektivet:
exercises.explanation: 'Small' (liten) ГӨr adjektivet вҖ“ det beskriver fГҘgeln.

grammar.title: Do / Does
grammar.description: LГӨr dig anvГӨnda do och does i frГҘgor och negationer.

exercises.question: VГӨlj rГӨtt: '___ you like ice cream?'
exercises.explanation: Med I/you/we/they anvГӨnder vi 'Do'. Do you like ice cream?

exercises.question: VГӨlj rГӨtt: '___ she play football?'
exercises.explanation: Med he/she/it anvГӨnder vi 'Does'. Does she play football?

exercises.question: VГӨlj rГӨtt: 'I ___ not like vegetables.'
exercises.explanation: Med I anvГӨnder vi 'do not' (don't) fГ¶r att neka. I do not like vegetables.

exercises.hint: Han = he, sГҘ vilket ord passar?
exercises.explanation: Med he/she/it anvГӨnder vi 'Does' i frГҘgor.
Med you anvГӨnder vi 'Do' i frГҘgor.

exercises.question: VГӨlj rГӨtt: 'They ___ not play outside.'
exercises.explanation: Med they anvГӨnder vi 'do not'. They do not play outside.

exercises.question: VГӨlj rГӨtt: '___ it rain in the winter?'
exercises.explanation: Med it anvГӨnder vi 'Does'. Does it rain in winter?
Med she anvГӨnder vi 'does not' fГ¶r att neka.

exercises.question: VГӨlj rГӨtt: '___ we need to go now?'
exercises.explanation: Med we anvГӨnder vi 'Do'. Do we need to go now?

exercises.question: VГӨlj rГӨtt: 'He ___ not eat fish.'
exercises.explanation: Med he anvГӨnder vi 'does not'. He does not eat fish.

reading.title: Sam's Day
reading.description: En kort berГӨttelse om en dag i Sams liv.
reading.text:
Sam wakes up in the morning. He eats breakfast with his family.

Sam has a dog. The dog's name is Rex. Rex is big and brown.

After breakfast, Sam goes to school. He likes school. His favourite subject is English!

After school, Sam plays with Rex in the garden. They run and jump together. Sam is happy.

questions.question: What is the name of Sam's dog?
questions.explanation: The text says: 'The dog's name is Rex.'

questions.question: What is Sam's favourite subject at school?
questions.explanation: The text says 'His favourite subject is English!'

questions.question: What does the story tell us about Sam?
options: He is a happy boy who loves his dog.
He wants to be a teacher.
questions.explanation: The story shows Sam is happy (last sentence), loves his dog Rex, and enjoys school вҖ” a happy, active boy.

helpText: LГӨsfГ¶rstГҘelse handlar om att fГ¶rstГҘ VAD texten berГӨttar вҖ“ inte att kunna varje ord.
LГӨs texten en gГҘng fГ¶r helheten. LГӨs den igen och leta efter svar pГҘ frГҘgorna.
Tips: 'PГҘ raden'-frГҘgor = svaret finns direkt i texten. Hitta meningen och lГӨs om den!

reading.title: Welcome to the Jungle Camp
reading.description: LГӨs om djungellГӨget och de vilda djuren.
reading.text:
Deep in the jungle, there is a special camp. Animals live here. There are monkeys, parrots, and big cats.

The monkeys are funny. They jump from tree to tree. They eat bananas and fruit.

The parrots are very colourful. They can say words! 'Hello! Hello!' they say all day.

The big cats are strong and fast. They sleep in the sun. At night, they hunt for food.

At the camp, children can learn about these animals. It is a fun place to visit!

questions.question: What do the monkeys eat?
questions.explanation: The text says the monkeys 'eat bananas and fruit'.

questions.question: Why do the big cats sleep in the sun during the day?
options: Because they hunt at night and rest during the day
Because they are afraid of the dark
questions.explanation: The text says they hunt at night. If they hunt at night, they probably rest during the day.

questions.question: What is the main message of this text?
options: The jungle camp is a great place to learn about animals.
Parrots are the most important animals.
questions.explanation: The text ends with 'It is a fun place to visit' вҖ” the text wants to tell us how great and educational the camp is.

helpText: LГӨs texten noggrant вҖ“ svaren pГҘ frГҘgorna finns i texten!
Om du inte fГ¶rstГҘr ett ord, lГӨs meningarna runt det вҖ“ kontexten ger ofta ledtrГҘdar.
Tips: Du kan alltid gГҘ tillbaka och lГӨsa texten igen under frГҘgorna.

spelling.title: Skolan
spelling.description: Stava ord som hГ¶r till skolan pГҘ engelska.

exercises.question: Vilket ord stavas rГӨtt? ('bok')
exercises.explanation: Book stavas B-O-O-K.

exercises.question: Vilket ord stavas rГӨtt? ('penna/blyertspenna')
exercises.explanation: Pencil stavas P-E-N-C-I-L.

exercises.sentence: My ___ helps me learn new things. (lГӨrare)
exercises.explanation: Teacher = lГӨrare. Stavas T-E-A-C-H-E-R.

exercises.sentence: I ___ my name on the paper. (skriver)
exercises.explanation: Write = skriva. Stavas W-R-I-T-E.

exercises.question: Vilket ord stavas rГӨtt? ('skola')
exercises.explanation: School stavas S-C-H-O-O-L.

helpText: Stava engelska ord: lГӨs ordet hГ¶gt och fГ¶rsГ¶k se det framfГ¶r dig bokstav fГ¶r bokstav.
Skolord du ska kunna: pencil, book, teacher, classroom, ruler, eraser, desk, chair.
Tips: Dela upp lГҘnga ord i delar вҖ“ 'class-room', 'black-board'. Det blir lГӨttare!

spelling.title: Djur

exercises.question: Vilket ord stavas rГӨtt? ('groda')
exercises.explanation: Frog stavas F-R-O-G.

exercises.question: Vilket ord stavas rГӨtt? ('hГӨst')
exercises.explanation: Horse stavas H-O-R-S-E.

exercises.sentence: A ___ has long ears and hops. (kanin)
exercises.explanation: Rabbit = kanin. Stavas R-A-B-B-I-T.

exercises.question: Vilket ord stavas rГӨtt? ('apa')
exercises.explanation: Monkey stavas M-O-N-K-E-Y.

exercises.question: Vilket ord stavas rГӨtt? ('elefant')
exercises.explanation: Elephant stavas E-L-E-P-H-A-N-T.

helpText: Djurnamn pГҘ engelska kan se konstiga ut men det finns mГ¶nster!
Vanliga djur: cat, dog, bird, fish, horse, elephant, lion, tiger, rabbit, mouse.
Tips: TГӨnk pГҘ hur djuret ser ut eller lГҘter вҖ“ det kan hjГӨlpa dig komma ihГҘg stavningen.

spelling.title: FГӨrger och former
spelling.description: Stava fГӨrger och former pГҘ engelska.

exercises.question: Vilket ord stavas rГӨtt? ('gul')
exercises.explanation: Yellow stavas Y-E-L-L-O-W.
Square = kvadrat. Stavas S-Q-U-A-R-E.

exercises.question: Vilket ord stavas rГӨtt? ('orange')
exercises.explanation: Orange stavas O-R-A-N-G-E.
Circle = cirkel. Stavas C-I-R-C-L-E.

exercises.question: Vilket ord stavas rГӨtt? ('lila')
exercises.explanation: Purple stavas P-U-R-P-L-E.

helpText: FГӨrger och former ГӨr viktiga basord pГҘ engelska.
FГӨrger: red, blue, green, yellow, orange, purple, pink, brown, black, white.
Former: circle, square, triangle, rectangle, star, heart.
Tips: Koppla ihop fГӨrgen med nГҘgot du kГӨnner igen вҖ“ red som rГ¶d, blue som blГҘ!

spelling.title: Kroppen

exercises.question: Vilket ord stavas rГӨtt? ('axel')
exercises.explanation: Shoulder stavas S-H-O-U-L-D-E-R.
Teeth = tГӨnder. Stavas T-E-E-T-H.

exercises.question: Vilket ord stavas rГӨtt? ('finger')
exercises.explanation: Finger stavas F-I-N-G-E-R.

exercises.sentence: You bend your leg at the ___. (knГӨ)
exercises.explanation: Knee = knГӨ. Stavas K-N-E-E.

exercises.question: Vilket ord stavas rГӨtt? ('mage')
exercises.explanation: Stomach stavas S-T-O-M-A-C-H.

helpText: Kroppsdelar pГҘ engelska вҖ“ mГҘnga liknar svenska ord!
Vanliga ord: head, eye, ear, nose, mouth, arm, hand, leg, foot.
Tips: Peka pГҘ kroppsdelen medan du stavar вҖ“ det hjГӨlper minnet!

spelling.title: Vardag

exercises.question: Vilket ord stavas rГӨtt? ('hejdГҘ')
exercises.explanation: Goodbye stavas G-O-O-D-B-Y-E.

exercises.sentence: I am going to the park ___. (imorgon)
exercises.explanation: Tomorrow = imorgon. Stavas T-O-M-O-R-R-O-W.

exercises.question: Vilket ord stavas rГӨtt? ('igГҘr')
exercises.explanation: Yesterday stavas Y-E-S-T-E-R-D-A-Y.

exercises.sentence: I need food because I am ___. (hungrig)
exercises.explanation: Hungry = hungrig. Stavas H-U-N-G-R-Y.

exercises.question: Vilket ord stavas rГӨtt? ('familj')
exercises.explanation: Family stavas F-A-M-I-L-Y.

helpText: Vardagsord ГӨr de ord du stГ¶ter pГҘ mest i det dagliga livet.
TГӨnk pГҘ situationer: hemma, i skolan, i affГӨren вҖ“ vilka ord behГ¶ver du?
Tips: LГӨs varje ord hГ¶gt, stava det tyst fГ¶r dig sjГӨlv, och skriv det utan att titta.

wordsearch.title: FГӨrger och djur
wordsearch.description: Hitta ord om fГӨrger och djur gГ¶mda i bokstavsrutnГӨtet.

wordsearch.title: I skolan
wordsearch.description: Hitta ord som hГ¶r till skolan.

words.clue: Man skriver med den вҖ” penna
Man lГӨser i den вҖ” bok
Man sitter vid den вҖ” bГӨnk/skrivbord
Man sitter pГҘ den вҖ” stol
Man skriver pГҘ den вҖ” tavla
LГӨr ut i skolan вҖ” lГӨrare
